creator: ed@fxq.nl
text:
All initial goals of the Herrie project have been reached. Therefore
Herrie 1.0 has been released. This release only includes minor fixes,
including more source code documentation. The file browser and playlist
will also prevent as much whitespace at the bottom as possible (when
pressing page down or removing songs).

Fix: Apply the patch below:
How-To-Repeat: n/a
